revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:WikiProject Lua header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:WikiProject Lua header/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:WikiProject Lua header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:WikiProject Lua header/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:WikiProject Lua header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:WikiProject Lua header/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles}} == Usage == Add to page: {{tlx|WikiProject Lua header}} Will show: {{WikiProject Lua header}} == Background == Colors used are derived from the dark blue in the [http://www.lua.org/pil/contents.html#P1Lua Lua logo]: {| class=wikitable |+ Lua colors and wikipedia backgrounds ([[Help:Using colors]]) ! !! RGB !! HSV !! Color !! General usage !! Note |- | 1  | #000080 || 240°, 100%, 50% | style="background:#000080" |   | Source sample || [[:File:Lua-logo-nolabel.svg|Lua logo]] |- | 2 | #0000FF || Hue=240° (66.7%; 170/255dec) 100%, 100% | style="background:#0000FF" |   | Basic hue || What we'd call ''the color'' |- | |- | 3 | #A3A3BF || 240°, 15%, 75% | style="background:#A3A3BF" |   | Header border only || |- | 4 | #CECEF2 || 240°, 15%, 95% | style="background:#CECEF2" |   | Main border; Header background || |- | 5 | #E6E6FF || 240°, 10%, 100% | style="background:#E6E6FF" |   | 2nd header, accent colour || |- | 6 | #F5F5FF || 240°, 4%, 100% | style="background:#F5F5FF" |   | Main background || |} Colors used in the header: Border: 2 (not 3 to associate well with basic Lua color) Active tab and wide bottom bar: 5 Inactive tabs: 6 Not used: 4 {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:WikiProject templates|Lua]] [[Category:Lua language on Wikipedia]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles}} == Usage == Add to page: {{tlx|WikiProject Lua header}} Will show: {{WikiProject Lua header}} == Background == Colors used are derived from the dark blue in the [http://www.lua.org/pil/contents.html#P1Lua Lua logo]: {| class=wikitable |+ Lua colors and wikipedia backgrounds ([[Help:Using colors]]) ! !! RGB !! HSV !! Color !! General usage !! Note |- | 1  | #000080 || 240°, 100%, 50% | style="background:#000080" |   | Source sample || [[:File:Lua-logo-nolabel.svg|Lua logo]] |- | 2 | #0000FF || Hue=240° (66.7%; 170/255dec) 100%, 100% | style="background:#0000FF" |   | Basic hue || What we'd call ''the color'' |- | |- | 3 | #A3A3BF || 240°, 15%, 75% | style="background:#A3A3BF" |   | Header border only || |- | 4 | #CECEF2 || 240°, 15%, 95% | style="background:#CECEF2" |   | Main border; Header background || |- | 5 | #E6E6FF || 240°, 10%, 100% | style="background:#E6E6FF" |   | 2nd header, accent colour || |- | 6 | #F5F5FF || 240°, 4%, 100% | style="background:#F5F5FF" |   | Main background || |} Colors used in the header: Border: 2 (not 3 to associate well with basic Lua color) Active tab and wide bottom bar: 5 Inactive tabs: 6 Not used: 4 {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:WikiProject templates|Lua]] [[Category:Lua language on Wikipedia]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses TemplateStyles}} == Usage == Add to page: {{tlx|WikiProject Lua header}} Will show: {{WikiProject Lua header}} == Background == Colors used are derived from the dark blue in the [http://www.lua.org/pil/contents.html#P1Lua Lua logo]: {| class=wikitable |+ Lua colors and wikipedia backgrounds ([[Help:Using colors]]) ! !! RGB !! HSV !! Color !! General usage !! Note |- | 1  | #000080 || 240°, 100%, 50% | style="background:#000080" |   | Source sample || [[:File:Lua-logo-nolabel.svg|Lua logo]] |- | 2 | #0000FF || Hue=240° (66.7%; 170/255dec) 100%, 100% | style="background:#0000FF" |   | Basic hue || What we'd call ''the color'' |- | |- | 3 | #A3A3BF || 240°, 15%, 75% | style="background:#A3A3BF" |   | Header border only || |- | 4 | #CECEF2 || 240°, 15%, 95% | style="background:#CECEF2" |   | Main border; Header background || |- | 5 | #E6E6FF || 240°, 10%, 100% | style="background:#E6E6FF" |   | 2nd header, accent colour || |- | 6 | #F5F5FF || 240°, 4%, 100% | style="background:#F5F5FF" |   | Main background || |} Colors used in the header: Border: 2 (not 3 to associate well with basic Lua color) Active tab and wide bottom bar: 5 Inactive tabs: 6 Not used: 4 {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:WikiProject templates|Lua]] [[Category:Lua language on Wikipedia]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

RGB !! HSV !! Color !! General usage !! Note |- | 1  | #000080 || 240°, 100%, 50% | style="background:#000080" |   | Source sample || [[:File:Lua-logo-nolabel.svg|Lua logo]] |- | 2 | #0000FF || Hue=240° (66.7%; 170/255dec) 100%, 100% | style="background:#0000FF" |   | Basic hue || What we'd call ''the color'' |- | |- | 3 | #A3A3BF || 240°, 15%, 75% | style="background:#A3A3BF" |   | Header border only || |- | 4 | #CECEF2 || 240°, 15%, 95% | style="background:#CECEF2" |   | Main border; Header background || |- | 5 | #E6E6FF || 240°, 10%, 100% | style="background:#E6E6FF" |   | 2nd header, accent colour || |- | 6 | #F5F5FF || 240°, 4%, 100% | style="background:#F5F5FF" |   | Main background || |} Colors used in the header: Border: 2 (not 3 to associate well with basic Lua color) Active tab and wide bottom bar: 5 Inactive tabs: 6 Not used: 4 {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:WikiProject templates|Lua]] [[Category:Lua language on Wikipedia]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23693191906|commit triggered pipeline]]

RGB !! HSV !! Color !! General usage !! Note |- | 1  | #000080 || 240°, 100%, 50% | style="background:#000080" |   | Source sample || [[:File:Lua-logo-nolabel.svg|Lua logo]] |- | 2 | #0000FF || Hue=240° (66.7%; 170/255dec) 100%, 100% | style="background:#0000FF" |   | Basic hue || What we'd call ''the color'' |- | |- | 3 | #A3A3BF || 240°, 15%, 75% | style="background:#A3A3BF" |   | Header border only || |- | 4 | #CECEF2 || 240°, 15%, 95% | style="background:#CECEF2" |   | Main border; Header background || |- | 5 | #E6E6FF || 240°, 10%, 100% | style="background:#E6E6FF" |   | 2nd header, accent colour || |- | 6 | #F5F5FF || 240°, 4%, 100% | style="background:#F5F5FF" |   | Main background || |} Colors used in the header: Border: 2 (not 3 to associate well with basic Lua color) Active tab and wide bottom bar: 5 Inactive tabs: 6 Not used: 4 {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:WikiProject templates|Lua]] [[Category:Lua language on Wikipedia]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]

RGB !! HSV !! Color !! General usage !! Note |- | 1  | #000080 || 240°, 100%, 50% | style="background:#000080" |   | Source sample || [[:File:Lua-logo-nolabel.svg|Lua logo]] |- | 2 | #0000FF || Hue=240° (66.7%; 170/255dec) 100%, 100% | style="background:#0000FF" |   | Basic hue || What we'd call ''the color'' |- | |- | 3 | #A3A3BF || 240°, 15%, 75% | style="background:#A3A3BF" |   | Header border only || |- | 4 | #CECEF2 || 240°, 15%, 95% | style="background:#CECEF2" |   | Main border; Header background || |- | 5 | #E6E6FF || 240°, 10%, 100% | style="background:#E6E6FF" |   | 2nd header, accent colour || |- | 6 | #F5F5FF || 240°, 4%, 100% | style="background:#F5F5FF" |   | Main background || |} Colors used in the header: Border: 2 (not 3 to associate well with basic Lua color) Active tab and wide bottom bar: 5 Inactive tabs: 6 Not used: 4 {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:WikiProject templates|Lua]] [[Category:Lua language on Wikipedia]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
